title: Technicality
description: A remaster of Minimalist Machines for CEU and GTCEUModern, Inspired by Minimalist machines and UUTex for 5u. By Ghostipedia
body:
Technicality is a continuation and revival of Minimalist Machines by Pyrolusite for GT:CEU
As they have been inactive since 2020 and have stopped supporting their project.

This pack was explicitly made to modify textures for the mod "GregTech:Community Edition Unofficial"
This pack as it stands changes textures for the vast majority machines, ingots, fluids, and other miscellaneous items. Please Refer to the images tab for a visual overview. As it stands right now, this does not affect vanilla textures.

Eventually a total UI Overhaul is planned that will coalesce Vanilla, JEI and CEU overlays into the same style.

Some materialSets and metaItems from Zedtech have also been used in place of the originals

While this project is simply a revival & remix for now, it will eventually grow to fully encompass every part of GTCEU.


Credits and Assets used (Both are Under Creative Commons License - Attribution, Non Commercial, Share Alike 4.0 International)

Zedtech Textures by Brachy84 and Cosmicnovastar_  - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/zedtech

Minimalist Machinery By Pyrolusite - https://forum.industrial-craft.net/thread/10612-16x-minimalist-technology-gt6-gt5e/
